}

  "notes": [
    "TipTap v3 getJSON() returns DocumentType (NodeType|TextType), not JSONContent — tests cast to JSONContent for attribute access",
    "TipTap v3 StarterKit renamed 'history' option to 'undoRedo'; 'document'/'text' options only accept false",
    "@typescript-eslint/no-namespace forbids global JSX namespace declaration — wired-elements types moved to separate .d.ts using declare module 'react' pattern",
    "fake-indexeddb/auto shares a single global IDBFactory; DB isolation in tests achieved via unique DB names per test (resetDB accepts optional name parameter)",
    "Fake timers deadlock with idb promises — auto-save timer tests mock updateDocument instead of using real idb, avoiding the deadlock",
    "@types/roughjs does not exist on npm; roughjs ships its own TypeScript declarations"
  ],
  "commit": "feat(editor): implement Phase 3 editor core, aesthetic, persistence, and sync"
}

    "packages/editor/src/__tests__/attribution-overlay.test.ts",
    ".agent/impl_docs/progress.md"
  ],
  "notes": "Implemented all 11 Phase 4 tasks plus IU-1. Paste detection queries IndexedDB copy_records (exact/substring match, confidence 1.0) then AI pool entries (≥80% substring overlap, confidence <1.0) and tags matching pastes RED. Edit tracker listens to transactions with 500ms debounce, computes normalizedEditDistance per pasteEventId, and transitions RED→YELLOW at 20% and YELLOW→GREEN at 70% edit distance. Attribution overlay toggle shows/hides span highlights (CSS scoped to .show-attribution class) and summary bar with RED/YELLOW/GREEN character percentages. Yellow gradient opacity computed from edit distance and set as CSS custom property in renderHTML. All 140 tests pass (65 editor + 75 extension), lint clean."
}
